column1: # :Worksheet Column-Width Set/Reset — the WYSIWYG colon-menu alias for
# /Worksheet Column Set-Width and Reset-Width. R3.4a promoted WYSIWYG to
# always-on; the same column-width state drives both the classic `[Wn]`
# tag on control panel line 1 and the WYSIWYG path.
# :WCS opens the width prompt, seeded with the current width.
# :WCR resets the current column back to default — the tag vanishes.
